About.title: About Me
About.subtitle: Crafting visual narratives that evoke emotion and leave a lasting impression.
About.bio1: With over a decade of experience behind the lens, I specialize in commercial and narrative cinematography. My approach is rooted in an unwavering dedication to storytelling through light, composition, and movement.
About.bio2: From gritty urban documentaries to high-fashion lookbooks, I bring a unique, cinematic eye to every project, ensuring that the visual language always serves the emotional core of the subject.
